--- NDC ---
[2026-03-10 21:46:42]   NDC: Voxelizing shape 1 (64^3)...
[2026-03-10 21:46:42] 
--- exp3_external_methods | Step: NDC voxelize 1 ---
$ python -c "import igl; import numpy as np; import trimesh; mesh = trimesh.load('/nashome/yhuang/yhuang/Workspace/ffb-mlp-experiments/data/obj/1.obj', force='mesh'); grid = np.mgrid[-1:1:64j, -1:1:64j, -1:1:64j]; pts = grid.reshape(3, -1).T; sd, _, _ = igl.signed_distance(pts, mesh.vertices, mesh.faces); udf = np.abs(sd).reshape(64, 64, 64); np.save('/nashome/yhuang/yhuang/Workspace/ffb-mlp-experiments/experiments/exp3_external_methods/output/ndc_data/1_udf_grid.npy', udf.astype(np.float32)); print(f'Saved UDF grid: /nashome/yhuang/yhuang/Workspace/ffb-mlp-experiments/experiments/exp3_external_methods/output/ndc_data/1_udf_grid.npy')"

$ python -c "import sys; sys.path.insert(0, 'src'); from infer_vq_mlp import *; import numpy as np, torch; import train_vq_mlp; device = 'cuda' if torch.cuda.is_available() else 'cpu'; decoder = torch.load('/nashome/yhuang/yhuang/Workspace/ffb-mlp-experiments/experiments/exp3_external_methods/output/ckpts/ours_ffb/vqmlp-decoder.pt', map_location=device, weights_only=False); encoder = torch.load('/nashome/yhuang/yhuang/Workspace/ffb-mlp-experiments/experiments/exp3_external_methods/output/ckpts/ours_ffb/vqmlp-encoder.pt', map_location=device, weights_only=False); fe = torch.load('/nashome/yhuang/yhuang/Workspace/ffb-mlp-experiments/experiments/exp3_external_methods/output/ckpts/ours_ffb/vqmlp-featureEncoder.pt', map_location=device, weights_only=False); codes = np.load('/nashome/yhuang/yhuang/Workspace/ffb-mlp-experiments/experiments/exp3_external_methods/output/ckpts/ours_ffb/vqmlp-codes.npz'); lvec = torch.from_numpy(codes[codes.files[0]]).float().to(device); csv_p = 'data/csv/1.csv'; pos, d, imp = parse_csv_condition(csv_p); pos_t = torch.from_numpy(pos).float().to(device); dir_t = torch.from_numpy(d).float().to(device); imp_t = torch.from_numpy(imp).float().to(device); decoder.eval(); encoder.eval(); fe.eval(); fz = fe(pos_t, dir_t, imp_t); vol = infer_volume(decoder, encoder, fe, fz, lvec[0], resolution=64, device=device); vol = np.abs(vol); np.save('/nashome/yhuang/yhuang/Workspace/ffb-mlp-experiments/experiments/exp3_external_methods/output/meshudf_data/1_udf_vol.npy', vol.astype(np.float32)); print(f'Saved UDF volume: /nashome/yhuang/yhuang/Workspace/ffb-mlp-experiments/experiments/exp3_external_methods/output/meshudf_data/1_udf_vol.npy')"
